review_results.architecture: core public language and handoff contracts are package-boundary guarded
review_results.security: secret values are excluded from durable core graph data
review_results.data_engineering: Postgres stores and UnitOfWork implementations remain non-core
review_results.supply_chain: core dependencies are limited to Jinja2 and PyYAML
review_results.docker_ownership: runtime cleanup and ownership proofs remain interpreter/runtime handoffs
review_results.test_integrity: successor evidence and reviewed supersession preserve required laws without skips or assertion weakening

stop_statement: EXTRACT.E is complete for extracted core release-candidate parity. Operator approval is required before #600 begins.
